1 ?04 0001111101 6

Constant
1 C 1 1111111111 a mismatch
1 C 1n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
1 I 0 1111101100 7 mismatch
1 I 0n 0000010011 3 mismatch

Unary 4
1 I 4 1110010001 5 mismatch
1 I 4n 0001101110 5 mismatch

Binary 04
1 AND 04 1110000000 3 mismatch
1 AND 04n 0001111111 7 mismatch
1 OR 04 1111111101 9 mismatch
1 OR 04n 0000000010 1 mismatch

2 XOR 15 1100011101 6 match 2/4

I 5 0010111100 partial 1110100001 5

left 23
Starting at I 4 decreasing
I 3 1101001011 partial 1011011010 6
I 2 1011110000 partial 1000011010 4
I 1 1110100001 partial 0010111100 5
I 0 1111101100 partial 1110010001 5

Choosing left
1 I 4
2 I 5
3 I 6
4 I 7

Selected
0 I 3
1 XOR 04
2 XOR 15
3 XOR 26
4 XOR 37
5 I 4
6 I 5
7 I 6

Applying to 11001101
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 3 = 0
1 XOR 04 = XOR(I 0,I 4) = XOR(1,1) = 0
2 XOR 15 = XOR(I 1,I 5) = XOR(1,1) = 0
3 XOR 26 = XOR(I 2,I 6) = XOR(0,0) = 0
4 XOR 37 = XOR(I 3,I 7) = XOR(0,1) = 1
5 I 4 = 1
6 I 5 = 1
7 I 6 = 0

\boxed{00001110}
